extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule Posting
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Columbia Gulf Transmission, LLC (CGT) hereby notifies customers the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website has been updated. CGT reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

The current schedule has been updated to reflect maintenance activity on the following:

* Revised end date – Corinth Compressor Station Unit 507 Maintenance – January 6 – March 20, 2026 (Previously scheduled to end on March 14, 2026)
* Revised dates – Alexandria Compressor Station Unit 908 Maintenance – March 20-25, 2026 (Previously scheduled for March 10-18, 2025)
* Holcomb Compressor Station Unit 2701 Maintenance – April 7-14, 2026
* Red Mountain Compressor Station Units 2901 and 2902 Maintenance – May 19-20, 2026
* Revised dates – Venice MS 595 Meter Station Maintenance – August 10-18, 2026 (Previously scheduled for August 2026)

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
CGT Construction and Maintenance Schedule 03-13-2026.pdf
affectedLocations: Red Mountain Compressor Station Units 2901 and 2902
